title: Mobile household waste shredder for carton/cardboard and plastic refuse
abstract: The invention relates to a mobile household waste shredder for carton/cardboard and plastic packaging refuse, the waste shredder (1) comprising: (i) an outer container or housing (2) defined by a longitudinal axis (L) and at a first longitudinal end provided with an openable/closeable lid (3) configured such that household waste can be introduced into the interior of the outer container (2), when the lid (3) is in an open state; (ii) a waste reception region (6) provided at the first longitudinal end of the outer container (2); (iii) a shredded waste reception region (21) provided in the outer container (2) adjacent the waste bin (22); (iv) a removable waste bin (22) provided adjacent said shredded waste reception region (21) and configured to receive and accommodate shredded waste (24), where the waste bin (22) is provided in the outer container (2) substantially at a second longitudinal end of the outer container (2) opposite said lid (3) and in communication with the shredded waste reception region (21 ); (v) a cutting device configured to receive waste to be shredded from the waste reception region (6) in an waste inlet portion (13) of the cutting device and to provide shredded waste to the shredded waste reception region (21) from a shredded waste outlet portion (16), where the cutting device comprises an inner cylindrical container (7) subdivided in sections (14, 15) by a number of cutter discs (8, 9, 10), one cutter disc being provided between each adjacent section, the cutter discs (8, 9, 10) being cylindrical with an individual diameter (di) substantially equal to the inner diameter of the inner cylindrical container (7) at the respective position of the inner cylindrical container (7), at which position the respective cutter disc is located, where the cutter discs (8, 9, 10) are mounted for co-rotation with a longitudinal drive shaft (11) extending longitudinally through the inner cylindrical container (7), where the drive shaft (11) is connected to a motor or similar means (12) configured to rotate the drive shaft (11) at a predetermined rotational speed; and (vi) where the shredded waste outlet portion (16) is in communication with the shredded waste reception region (21).
claims:
Claims 1 . A mobile household waste shredder for carton/cardboard and plastic packaging refuse, the waste shredder (1 ) comprising: - an outer container or housing (2) defined by a longitudinal axis (L) and at a first longitudinal end provided with an openable/closeable lid (3) configured such that household waste can be introduced into an interior portion of the outer container (2), when the lid (3) is in an open state; - a waste reception region (6) provided at said first longitudinal end of the outer container (2); - a shredded waste reception region (21 ) provided in the outer container (2) adjacent a waste bin (22); - a removable waste bin (22) provided adjacent said shredded waste reception region (21 ) and configured to receive and accommodate shredded waste (24), where the waste bin (22) is provided in the outer container (2) substantially at a second longitudinal end of the outer container (2) opposite said lid (3) and in communication with said shredded waste reception region (21 ); - a cutting device configured to receive waste to be shredded from the waste reception region (6) in an waste inlet portion (13) of the cutting device and to provide shredded waste to the shredded waste reception region (21 ) from a shredded waste outlet portion (16), where the cutting device comprises an inner cylindrical container (7) subdivided in sections (14, 15) by a number of cutter discs (8, 9, 10), one cutter disc being provided between each adjacent section (14, 15), the cutter discs (8, 9, 10) being cylindrical with an individual diameter (di) substantially equal to the inner diameter of the inner cylindrical container (7) at the respective position of the inner cylindrical container (7), at which position the respective cutter disc is located, where the cutter discs (8, 9, 10) are mounted for co-rotation with a longitudinal drive shaft (1 1 ) extending longitudinally through the inner cylindrical container (7), where the drive shaft (1 1 ) is connected to a motor or similar means (12) configured to rotate the drive shaft (1 1 ) at a predetermined rotational speed; - where said shredded waste outlet portion (16) is in communication with said shredded waste reception region (21 ). 2. A mobile household waste shredder according to claim 1 , wherein a contact region is formed between an outer circumferential edge portion of the respective cutter discs (8, 9, 10) and the 

 corresponding inner circumferential surface of the inner cylindrical container (7), where said contact region is provided with contact means configured to ensure that contact is maintained between the outer circumferential edge portion of the respective cutter discs (8, 9, 10) and the corresponding inner circumferential surface of the inner cylindrical container (7) when the cutter discs (8, 9, 10) are rotating about the longitudinal axis (L). 3. A mobile household waste shredder according to claim 2, wherein said contact means comprises a roller bearing extending between the outer circumferential edge portion of the respective cutter discs (8, 9, 10) and the corresponding inner circumferential surface of the inner cylindrical container (7), whereby a smooth and substantially frictionless contact between the outer circumferential edge portion of the respective cutter discs (8, 9, 10) and the corresponding inner circumferential surface of the inner cylindrical container (7) is obtained. 4. A mobile household waste shredder according to claim 1 , 2 or 3, wherein said cutter discs (8, 9, 10) comprise cutter blades (8', 9', 10') that extend radially over more than 50% of the diameter of the respective disc (8, 9, 10), preferably more than 75% of the diameter of the respective disc (8, 9, 10) and still more preferably over more than 90% of the diameter of the respective disc (8, 9, 10). 5. A mobile household waste shredder according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said cutter discs (8, 9, 10) are provided with cutter blades (8', 9', 10', 73) extending radially from a hub portion (72) of the respective disc towards its periphery, and wherein through going passages (76) are provided between adjacent cutter blades such that waste can pass through the cutter disc, where the respective cutter blades (8', 9', 10', 73) are provided with a leading cutting edge (77), and where the cutter blades (8', 9', 10', 73) are configured such that they - when rotated about said longitudinal axis L - generates an air flow through said passages (76) that will urge the waste through the cutter discs(8, 9, 10). 6. A mobile household waste shredder according to any of the preceding claims, wherein an air passage is established in the interior space defined between the outer container (2) and the inner cylindrical container (7), which air passage provides air communication between said shredded waste reception region (21 ) and said waste reception region (6). 7. A mobile household waste shredder according to any of the preceding claims, wherein a first cutter disc (8) provided closest to said waste reception region (6) is configured to chop the waste coarsely and wherein one or more further cutter discs (9, 10) are configured to chop the 

 waste more and more finely, the closer the specific cutter disk is located to said shredded waste outlet portion (16) of the cutting device. 8. A mobile household waste shredder according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said inner cylindrical container (7) is provided with a longitudinally extending slit (37) extending from one longitudinal end of the inner cylindrical container (7) to the opposite longitudinal end hereof, whereby the diameter of the inner cylindrical container (7) can be increased, thereby facilitating removal of the inner cylindrical container (7) from the cutting device and/or outer container (2). 9. A mobile household waste shredder according to any of the preceding claims, wherein one or more sensors (66, 67) are provided in the lid (3) and/or an upper edge portion of the outer container (2), which sensors provide signals to a control system incorporated in the waste shredder, where the control system is configured to only allow said motor (12) to be started, when the lid (3) is in its closed position on the outer container (2). 10. A mobile household waste shredder according to any of the preceding claims, wherein one or more sensors are provided in or adjacent said shredded waste reception region (21 ), which sensors provide signals to a control system incorporated in the waste shredder, where the control system is configured to stop said motor (12), when the waste bin (22) is removed from the outer container (2). 1 1 . A household waste shredder according to any of the preceding claims comprising a control system and a user interface means (30) in functional communication with the control system, configured such that a user from the user interface (30) can control basic functions of the household waste shredder, such as starting and stopping the drive motor and controlling the rotational speed of the cutter discs, where the control system is further in communication with said sensors, such that the control system will only allow said drive motor (12) to be started, when said lid (3) is in its closed state, and such that the control system will stop the motor (12), if said waste bin (22) is removed from the outer container (2), when the motor (12) is running. 12. A household waste shredder according to any of the preceding claims comprising one or more load sensor means configured to detect if at least one of the cutter discs (8, 9, 10) is/are loaded by waste material, where said load sensors are in communication with said control system, such that the control system stops the drive motor (12), when the cutter discs have 

 been rotating for a predetermined amount of time and when said load sensors detect that the cutter discs (8, 9, 10) are not loaded by waste material. 13. A household waste shredder according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the drive shaft (1 1 ) at the upper longitudinal end opposite the drive motor (12) is provided with one or more wing members (78, 79, 80, 81 , 82, 83) extending radially outwards from the drive shaft (1 1 ) at an angle (a) with the longitudinal axis (L) of the drive shaft (1 1 ). 14. A household shredder according to claim 13, wherein said wing members are provided with a cutting edge configured to decompose waste introduced in the waste reception region (6) before the waste reaches the uppermost cutter disc (8).
